Thank you for your patience.

Hello Grace,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your ProSound Wireless Headphones (Order ORD-1013).

Upon checking, the return window for high-value electronics like your headphones is 15 days from the delivery date. Your order was delivered on October 5, 2023, making the return deadline October 20, 2023. Unfortunately, this period has passed, and your order is no longer eligible for a return.

Regarding your question about product registration, our policy states that registering certain products online voids the standard return policy. This was noted on your order.

While we cannot process a return at this time, your headphones are covered by a 12-month warranty. If you experience any issues with their functionality, please let us know, and we can assist you with a warranty claim.

Best regards,
ShopWave Support

Upon reviewing your request, I see that the return window for these headphones was 15 days from the delivery date, which was October 5, 2023. This means the deadline for returns was November 4, 2023. Unfortunately, as we are now well past this date, we are unable to process a return for this item.

While product registration is valuable for warranty purposes and staying updated on product information, it does not extend the standard return period. Our return policy clearly outlines the timeframe for eligible returns.

input.query: return process

input.message:
Hi Henry,

Thanks for reaching out! I can certainly explain our return process and your deadline for the TrailRunner X Shoes (ORD-1014).

Your return deadline for these shoes is **March 31, 2024**.

Here's how our standard return process works:
1. Log in to your ShopWave account on our website.
2. Go to your 'Order History' and find order number ORD-1014.
3. Click on the 'Return Item' button next to the TrailRunner X Shoes.
4. Follow the prompts to select your reason for return and generate a printable return shipping label.
5. Pack the shoes securely, ideally in their original packaging, and attach the return label.
6. Drop off the package at any designated shipping carrier location before your deadline of March 31, 2024.

Once we receive and inspect the returned item, a refund will be issued to your original payment method within 5-7 business days. You'll receive a confirmation email once your refund is processed.

Please let us know if you have any other questions or need assistance with initiating the return!

Best regards,
ShopWave Support

Hi Henry,

Thanks for reaching out! I understand you're considering returning your TrailRunner X Shoes (Order ORD-1014) and would like to know more about the process and your deadline.

For your TrailRunner X Shoes, you have until **March 31, 2024**, to initiate a return. This is 30 days from your delivery date of March 1, 2024.

Here's a quick overview of our return process:
1.  **Initiate Return:** If you decide to proceed, you can easily start a return request through your ShopWave account under 'My Orders' or by simply replying to this email.
2.  **Condition:** Items must be returned in new, unworn condition, in their original packaging.
3.  **Shipping:** We'll provide you with a prepaid return shipping label, so returning your item is free and convenient.
4.  **Refund:** Once we receive and inspect your return, a full refund will be issued to your original payment method within 5-7 business days.

Please don't hesitate to let us know if you decide to proceed with the return or if you have any further questions. We're here to help!

reply_message:
Hi Irene,

Thanks for reaching out! I'd be happy to clarify ShopWave's return and exchange policy for you.

At ShopWave, we offer a **30-day return policy** from the date of purchase for most items. To be eligible for a return, items must be unused, in their original packaging, and with all tags attached.

Yes, we absolutely offer exchanges! You can exchange an item within the same 30-day window, provided it meets the return conditions. You can exchange for an item of equal value or receive store credit.

Please note that some exclusions may apply, such as final sale items. For complete details, you can always visit our full Return & Exchange Policy page on our website.

Let me know if you have any other questions!
